One firm viz. M/s Satguru Infra Solution has represented in GeM portal against the disqualification of their bid. The TEC (T) once again met on 02/07/2025 and after evaluation of the representation, recommended that the representation is not acceded and the bid is technically not qualified. The TEC (T) further recommended that the price bids of the technically qualified firms may be opened.

As per the above approved recommendations of TEC (Technical), price bids of the two technically qualified firms have been opened and summary of prices quoted are as follows:


Section IV: Evaluation by TEC (Finance):

TEC (Finance) has observed that both the firms are MSE and have quoted as per the terms and condition of the bid document and accordingly, their bids are admitted for financial evaluation. The committee observed that M/s. Praanjal Construction Company has quoted the lowest price (L1) at Rs. 5,43,120/- which is 3% lower than the estimated price of Rs. 5,60,000/-. The committee opined that the price quoted by the firm is reasonable may be accepted.

	The Tender Evaluation Committee (Technical) met on          /04/2025 in the chambers of the Addl. DG & HOD, GSI, WR and Chairman of the TEC to evaluate the technical bids received towards the procurement of Two hundred (200) BW Left Hand Drill Rod with Coupling for Nine (9) Conventional Drilling Machines of Engineering Division, GSI, WR.
Section I: Details of procurement
Members of the Tender Evaluation Committee (Technical)
Shri. Vijay V. Mugal, Addl. DG & HOD and Chairman
Drilling.signature_block:
The above recommendations of the TEC (T) may kindly be accepted.
(P Varaprasad)
EE (NFJAG) &
OIC: APMD
Member Secretary
The Addl. DG & HOD, GSI, WR please
Drilling.qualification_samples:
The diamond bits shall invariably be used in igneous/ metamorphic rocks comprising of hard and very hard formation with or without varying degree of quartzite intercalations. In case, if fractured formations are also encountered, the guaranteed performance for the bits used will be reduced by 20%. The decision of the department in such cases will be final and binding.

While considering the tenders, the past performance of the supplied bits will also be taken into account for finalization of the orders. 

If required during technical evaluation, the participating firms may be asked to supply one sample bit of any of the sizes for trial in the field.

a) The diamond tools supplied will be inspected visually for workmanship, dimensional accuracy and proper matching with the corresponding reaming shell. The lot of diamond tools will be accepted if found suitable on above criterion.

The performance of the diamond tools will be evaluated after actual field use. The average performance of the diamond tools will be evaluated after use of at least 40% of the ordered quantity or six months’ period whichever is earlier. The average performance will be applied to the balance unused diamond tools and if found satisfactory, security deposit will be released. The department reserves the right to recover from the firm the cost on pro-rata shortfall in performance of the bits for the entire lot from performance security.

Manpower.qualification_samples:
Further the committee recommended that the bids of the Seventy-four (74) firms are technically qualified.

Against the above recommendations of TEC (T), Thirty (30) firms have submitted their representations in GeM Portal against their disqualification. The TEC (T) met again on 23/07/2025, evaluated the representations and observed that M/s Shree Ram Security Agency is already qualified but represented and recommended to dispose-off the representation of remaining Twenty-nine (29) firms as not accepted.

The committee accordingly recommended for opening the price bids of a total of seventy-four (74) firms, which were technically qualified.

As per the approved recommendations of TEC (T), price bids of all Seventy-four (74) technically qualified firms have been opened and observed that 74 firms stood as L1. With the approval of the competent authority, the “Run L1 option” was activated in the GeM Portal.

Section IV: Evaluation by TEC (Finance):
